SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made and entered into as of this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

SELLER: Dr. Amanda Tan, NRIC No. S2345678I, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890.

BUYER: Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S8765432C, contactable at +65 9123 4567 and john.lim@fictionalmail.sg.

COMPANY: Fictional Ventures Pte. Ltd., UEN: 199123456A, a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #13-45, Singapore 048623.

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, 10,000 ordinary shares of Fictional Ventures Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 (Singapore Dollars Five Hundred Thousand), subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this SPA.

For avoidance of doubt, the project plan is not part of the SPA discussions, nor does it affect the project status.

Further details and conditions are outlined in the sections to follow within this document. The Buyer's NRIC details can be verified at https://confirm-id.sg/user/S8765432C.
